parameter.value:
<script>
window._sdi = window._sdi || {};

/*** CONFIGURE HELPER FUNCTIONS TO WRITE/READ COOKIES ***/
//	setCookie is specific to the comfortkeepers root domain
window._sdi.setCookie = function(cname, cvalue, exdays) {
  var d = new Date();
  d.setTime(d.getTime() + (exdays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
  var expires = "expires=" + d.toUTCString();
  document.cookie = cname + "=" + cvalue + "; " + expires + ";domain=.comfortkeepers.com;path=/";
}

window._sdi.getCookie = function(cname) {
  var name = cname + "=";
  var ca = document.cookie.split(';');
  for (var i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
    var c = ca[i];
    while (c.charAt(0) == ' ') c = c.substring(1);
    if (c.indexOf(name) == 0) return c.substring(name.length, c.length);
  }
  return "-1";
}

/*** CONFIGURE SEGMENT COOKIE ***/
// 	Reset the User Segment cookie on every page load.
//	If the cookie has not been previously set, identify user as level 0
var user_segment = window._sdi.getCookie('user_segment');
if ((parseInt(user_segment)) < 0) {
  window._sdi.setCookie('user_segment', 0, 90);
} else {
  window._sdi.setCookie('user_segment', user_segment, 90);
}

//	Create function to set segments
window._sdi.setSegment = function(n){
  var currentSegment = window._sdi.getCookie('user_segment');
  if(n > parseInt(currentSegment)){
    window._sdi.setCookie('user_segment', n, 90);
  }
}
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
  // Store Google Analytics Client ID in Cookie
  var CID = {{GA Client ID}};
  if((!CID || CID.length < 1) && window.ga){
    ga(function() {
      var trackers = ga.getAll();
      var trackerName = trackers[0].get('name');
      var gaTracker = ga.getByName(trackerName);
      var clientId = gaTracker.get('clientId');
      var date = new Date();
      date.setTime(date.getTime()+(2592000000));
      document.cookie="AST_ClientID="+clientId+"; expires="+date.toUTCString();
    });
  }
</script>

<script>
    /**
   * Polyfill browser functions that IE doesn't have
   * Remove this rule when IE marketshare falls below 1% for CK
   */

    // Polyfill element.closest 
    if (!Element.prototype.closest) {
      Element.prototype.closest = function(s) {
        var el = this;

        do {
          if (Element.prototype.matches.call(el, s)) return el;
          el = el.parentElement || el.parentNode;
        } while (el !== null && el.nodeType === 1);
        return null;
      };
    }
</script>

<script>
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
window.dataLayer.push({
  originalLocation: document.location.protocol + '//' +
                    document.location.hostname +
                    document.location.pathname + '?' +
                    {{URL Params}}
});
</script>

<script>
if (navigator.geolocation) {
    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
        function(position) {
            // User allowed location sharing
            dataLayer.push({
                'event': 'location_sharing',
                'location_status': 'allowed',
                'latitude': position.coords.latitude,
                'longitude': position.coords.longitude
            });
        },
        function(error) {
            if (error.code === error.PERMISSION_DENIED) {
                // User denied location sharing
                dataLayer.push({
                    'event': 'location_sharing',
                    'location_status': 'denied'
                });
            }
        }
    );
} else {
    // Browser does not support geolocation
    dataLayer.push({
        'event': 'location_sharing',
        'location_status': 'unsupported'
    });
}
</script>

trigger.notes: Triggering the pageview via a data layer push was causing us to fail to get an initial pageview when this GTM zone loads in too late. This now checks the data layer to see if a pageview event was pushed before the zone loaded and if so it fires the pageview.

parameter.value:
function(){
 
  {{Page URL}} = hold 
  hold = hold.split('?')[1] // only the qs params now
  hold.split('&')[0] // key value pairs now
  franchiseID = hold.split('&')[0].split('=')[1] // first of the rows franchise ID
  franchiseID = franchiseID.match(/^[0-9]{3}/)[0]
  city = hold.split('&')[1]
  city = city.split('=')[1]
  fin = city + '-' + franchiseID 
  return fin
	
}

variable.name: URL Params
variable.notes: This variable handles persisting the GCLID across a site visit. It allows franchise sites to see how corporate ad spend affects their traffic.

variable.name: CJS | eCommerce Variable
variable.notes: This is a standard practice for ensuring that we don't have any data layer values stick around between eCommerce events. The version 1 variable {{ Data Layer - eCommerce }} will only grab the eCommerce settings that are sent along with the event that triggered the current tag instead of from the computed state like version 2 variables will.
